---
title: "Drug Pharmacokinetics Affecting Neuro Exam"
---

Common Agents Affecting Neurologic Exam
Barbiturates
Drug Half Life (t½) Distribution Suggested time to brain death exam
~35-45% bound to
Pentobarbital ~4-50 hrs Pentobarbital level ≤ 10 mcg/ml
plasma proteins
~20-45% bound to
Phenobarbital ~2-6 days Phenobarbital level ≤ 10 mcg/ml
plasma proteins
Benzodiazepines
Suggested time to brain
Drug Half Life (t½) Distribution
death exam
Lorazepam 10-20 hrs Widely in most body tissues
Midazolam 1-12.5 hrs Widely, 95% protein bound
20-50 hrs, active Variable, if expect toxicity,
Diazepam Widely, 94-99% protein bound
metabolite 40-100 hrs wait 1.5-2 times the half life
10-48 hrs, active
Chlordiazepoxide Widely
metabolite 14-95 hrs
Neuromuscular blocking agents
Suggested time to brain
Drug Half Life (t½) Distribution
death exam
Biphasic t½ (2-3.4 min and 20 min
Atracurium Low body distribution
respectively)
Pancuronium Triphasic t½, terminal t½ ~2hr 87% protein bound
Train of four via peripheral
Rocuronium
nerve stimulation should
Metabolized rapidly, with effect
Succinylcholine Widely result in four thumb twitches
lasting ~10 min
Biphasic t½ (3-9 min and 30-80
Vecuronium Not fully characterized
min respectively)
Narcotics
Suggested time to brain
Drug Half Life (t½) Distribution
death exam
Widely, 30-35% protein
Morphine 1.5-4.5 hrs
bound
Widely, 80-86% protein
Fentanyl 3-7 hrs, duration 30-60 mins
bound Variable, if expect toxicity,
Two distributive t½, 1.27 wait 1.5-2 times the half life
Hydromorphone 2.5 hrs, duration 4-5 hrs
and 14.7 hrsrespectively
3.2-3.7 hrs, active metabolite 24- Widely, 65-80% protein
Meperidine
48 hrs bound
Oxycodone N/A N/A N/A
Miscellaneous Drugs
Suggested time to brain
Drug Half Life (t½) Distribution
death exam
Brain death exam after 2-3
Biphasic: alpha t½ = 1-8 mins, times half life. Neuro exam
Propofol Moderately
beta t½ = 1.5-12.4 hrs ok after drip off for 5-10
mins
Extremely high doses can
Dopamine ~2 minutes, duration ~10 minutes
fix/dilate pupils
Duration of cardiac effects ~5 Pupil effects after IV are
Atropine
mins transient
Ketamine 2-3 hrs 50% protein bound Recovery time 2-3 hrs
